chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-497 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 28.02.2025 Mr. Aslam Baig Laghari Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Yousuf Rahpoto Assistant AG. -.-.-. Learned Counsel for the Petitioner is present and submits a statement dated 28.02.2025 to show that the maintenance of the minors at Rs.20,000/- per month is being deposited by the Petitioner upto February 2025, which is taken on record. He further points out that no proof with respect to the fact that these amounts which are being deposited by the Petitioner are being spent on the welfare of the minors, has been filed by the Respondent No.3 and there exists apprehension that the amounts are not being spent on the minors. The Respondent No.3 is directed to file a statement along with all proofs and receipts to establish that the amount of maintenance which is being deposited by the Petitioner is actually being spent on the maintenance of minors on the next date. Issue intimation notice to Respondent No.3 for 11.04.2025. Let Report be called from the learned Family Judge-II, Hyderabad regarding meeting of the minors with the Petitioner. J U D G E Ali Haider
